case_title: JOSE RENE CRUZ VS. ANDREA MOORE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2020 - JUDGMENT. PREVOUSLY UNDER SUBMISSION ON JANUARY 15, 2020.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CRUZ, JOSE RENE AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, ANDREA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ, JOSE RENE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, JOSE RENE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOORE, ANDREA SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
